holdings.infoBox: QOWZ is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.47%, Broadcom at 8.09%, Meta Platforms at 5.78%, KLA Corporation at 5.41%, and Mastercard at 4.15%.

overview.description: The Invesco Nasdaq Free Cash Flow Achievers ETF (QOWZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq US Free Cash Flow Achievers index. The fund is passively managed, tracking an index composed of US-listed companies that are perceived to have strong free cash flow and show consistent growth. QOWZ was launched on Dec 6, 2023 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: Nasdaq US Free Cash Flow Achievers Index
